category_sources: source_facts.description: "Network traffic analyzer"; source_facts.homepage is the official darkstat project site.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is darkstat; source_facts.homepage uses the same project name.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official project homepage and best supplied documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies network traffic analysis; source_facts.executables lists the darkstat CLI.
